mapper.select: SELECT n.*, u.real_name as author_name FROM notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.author_id = u.id ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
SELECT n.*, u.real_name as author_name FROM notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.author_id = u.id ORDER BY n.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT n.*, u.real_name as author_name FROM notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.author_id = u.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, author_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
